repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.r: tidyverse and dplyr pipelines, data.frame versus tibble, vectorization over loops, renv and CRAN package management, R Markdown reproducibility, NA handling, factor pitfalls, the apply family
deploy a Kubernetes service with helm

retrieval_query: r language tidyverse dplyr pipeline tibble data frame vectorization apply family na handling factor renv cran rmarkdown reproducible

validation_smoke.name: code.r L3 validation smoke
signals: pipeline output column types match expectations
no row-wise loop where a vectorized op exists
NA cases handled explicitly not silently dropped

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.r diagnosis smoke
signals: accidental data.frame factor coercion changing values
growing a vector in a loop causing quadratic slowdown
NA silently propagating into an aggregate result
non-reproducible run from an unpinned package version
tibble vs data.frame subsetting returning a different shape
